title: 見つけて！私らしさと自分勝手の境界線

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the Princess Fighter show, King races in the
Takamatsunomiya Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite facing criticism, she proudly asserts that
she was simply being herself. Besides, she won
first place!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She tells me to also take pride in being myself
without worrying about what anyone else thinks.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Behave in a way that's true to myself and don't
fear hurting others! I decide to participate in the
talk show at the Fan Fest as a way to show my
conviction.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's scary, of course, but I have someone by my
side who reassures me that I'm not alone!
